title: Henbrandt 12 x Mini Christmas Bubble Tubes with Wand Children’s 4ml Bubbles with Xmas Toppers Stocking Loot Bag Fillers Party Bags Outdoor Games for Boys and Girls
features: Pack of 12 Bubble Tubes with festive Christmas designs for kids.
These mini bubble tubes are ideal for party bag favours, loot bag fillers, classroom rewards and summer fun.
There are 4 colours: Red, Green, Orange and Blue; and 4 festive topper icons: Santa Hat, Christmas Tree, Reindeer Antlers, and Snowflake.
description: Product description This multipack of 12 slim mini bubble tubes with Christmas icon toppers for children is ideal for stocking fillers, party bag fillers, loot bag treats, pinata prizes, classroom rewards, and Christmas party goodies. The bubbles also make a great outdoor game for trips to the park and wintery playground fun. Dip the wand in the bubble solution and gently blow to fill the air with iridescent bubbles of all shapes and sizes! Each mini tube of kids’ party bubbles is 10.5cm in length and contains 4ml of bubble solution. A bubble wand is included in the tube, and there are 4 festive Christmas topper designs: Santa Hat, Christmas Tree, Reindeer Antlers, and Snowflake. Mini bubble tubes come in 4 colours: Blue, Green, Red, Orange. Three of each colour per multipack. Pack of 12 Bubble Tubes with festive Christmas designs for kids. Recommended for use outside, as bubble solution may stain some fabrics – take appropriate precautions if using bubbles indoors. Do not leave children unsupervised with bubble mix. Bubble solution is not for internal consumption. Not suitable for children under the age of 3. This product carries the UKCA mark and complies with all applicable UK safety requirements. Indications For celebrations and outdoor games Safety Warning WARNING! Choking hazard, small parts. Contains bubble solution, staining risk. Adult supervision is recommended. See more
